HomePage.title: Smart Financial Management
HomePage.description: Control spending, save effectively and achieve financial freedom with MoneyMate.

features.title: Beyond just a recording app
features.description: MoneyMate provides powerful yet easy-to-use tools for you to optimize your personal finance management.

fastRecording.title: Super-fast recording
fastRecording.description: Record income and expenses with just 2 taps. Smart classification based on your habits.

diverseStats.title: Diverse statistics
diverseStats.description: Understand your cash flow through vivid and detailed pie, bar, and line charts over time.

multiLayerSecurity.title: Multi-layer security
multiLayerSecurity.description: End-to-end data encryption and support for fingerprint/face ID security. Your finances are always safe.

savingPlan.title: Savings planning
savingPlan.description: Set goals for buying a house, car, travel and track progress in the most intuitive way.

cloudSync.title: Cloud synchronization
cloudSync.description: Your data is instantly synced across all devices. Never worry about data loss.

groupManagement.title: Group/Family management
groupManagement.description: Unique feature helps you and your loved ones manage common funds transparently and easily.

testimonials.quote: "MoneyMate has completely changed the way I spend money"
testimonials.description: I used to not know where my money went at the end of the month. Thanks to MoneyMate, I saved my first 100 million after 1 year of use.
testimonials.author: Nam Le

cta.title: Ready to become a financial "master"?
cta.description: Start managing your finances effectively today. MoneyMate is committed to being free forever for basic features.

dialog.title: Customize Dashboard
dialog.description: Turn on/off components displayed on your overview page.

widgets.chartPlaceholder: Charts will be updated in the next version

Footer.mission: MoneyMate is built with the mission to help millions of Vietnamese people control their personal finances and achieve financial freedom.
